description: all_shifts returns a list of 26 strings, decrypting the message with every shift 0..25 (reuses caesar_decrypt)
english_score splits the text into words and counts how many are in COMMON_SET, returning the count
crack_caesar loops all 26 shifts, scores each decryption, and returns the shift with the highest score
Reuses the given helpers, tracks best_score/best_shift clearly, a return on every function
